arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_xscale=-1 bShowHealthBar=false oHUD.dragoonBossCheck=1 oHUD.enemyCheckID=id bActive=1
//Enemy base statistics eName="Fortress Skyguard" eLevel=38 maxLife=1300 life=maxLife atkPower=12 bIsBoss=true bNoBonus=true affiliation=7 dieEffect=0 weaponGive=300 bossProgress=0 activateBoss=0 myLives=1
moveBehavior=0 moveProg=0 otherUse=0 atkTimeA=100; atkDirA=0; atkExtA=0; atkStuffA=0 atkTimeB=0; atkDirB=0; atkExtB=20; atkStuffB=0 atkTimeC=0; atkDirC=0; atkExtC=0; atkStuffC=0
deathAnim=0
segmentProg=0 segmentTime=0 segSideGunX=-17 segSideGunY=-16 segFrontGuardX=0 segFrontGuardY=0 segFrontGunX=0 segFrontGunY=32 segWingsX=0 segWingsY=0 segWingsAngle=0
jeremyText="This thing cannot be eaten, sadly. As for its attack patterns, it seems to be borrowing heavily from bullet hell games." chaoText="I've got nothing to share on this thing since it has no data to look at for your eating ability." devText="N/A"
